email_body:
Beste,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Content Creator. Uw oproep voor een trendspotter met passie voor digitale storytelling sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring in digitale marketing, contentcreatie en SEO.

Bij Episto schrijf ik SEO-gerichte blogs en beheer ik sociale media-integratie voor WordPress-sites. Op mijn eigen project mirook.com produceer ik visuele content (foto's, video's) en ontwerp ik graphics met Canva. Ik ben thuis in Instagram, TikTok en LinkedIn, en volg trends op de voet om relevante, real-time content te maken. Mijn oog voor compositie en typografie helpt bij het creëren van esthetische posts.

Ik werk gestructureerd, schakel snel en communiceer professioneel in het Engels en Turks; mijn Nederlands is B1 en ik volg lessen om dit verder te verbeteren.

Ik voeg mijn motivatiebrief en CV bij. Ik hoop u in een gesprek meer te vertellen over hoe ik bij kan dragen aan uw team.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

I am very enthusiastic to apply for the Content Creator position. Your call for a trend-spotter with a passion for digital storytelling aligns perfectly with my experience in digital marketing, content creation, and SEO.

At Episto, I write SEO-focused blogs and manage social media integration for WordPress sites. On my own project mirook.com, I produce visual content (photos, videos) and design graphics with Canva. I am familiar with Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn, and follow trends closely to create relevant, real-time content. My eye for composition and typography helps create aesthetic posts.

I work in a structured way, adapt quickly, and communicate professionally in English and Turkish; my Dutch is B1 and I am taking classes to improve further.

I attach my cover letter and CV. I hope to tell you more in a conversation about how I can contribute to your team.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste,

Toen ik de vacature voor Content Creator las, voelde ik direct een klik. U zoekt iemand die trends spot, creatieve concepten bedenkt en deze omzet in hoogwaardige foto's, video's en graphics – precies waar ik dagelijks mee bezig ben.

Bij Episto (2026-heden) werk ik als junior digital marketer. Ik schrijf SEO-gerichte blogcontent, beheer sociale media-integratie en optimaliseer WordPress-sites. Hoewel mijn rol breder is, ligt mijn hart bij contentcreatie: ik denk mee over visuele concepten, maak gebruik van Canva voor graphics en zorg dat de content aansluit bij de merkstem. Op mijn eigen project mirook.com ben ik volledig verantwoordelijk voor de contentstrategie: van het bedenken van posts tot het schieten en editen van foto's en korte video's (Reels-formaat). Ik ontwerp social media tiles, carrousels en stories, en monitor trends om relevant te blijven.

Uw vereisten – portfolio, social savvy, oog voor esthetiek, wendbaarheid en technische basis – herken ik in mezelf. Mijn portfolio toont een mix van video, design en copy. Ik begrijp de algoritmes van Instagram, TikTok en LinkedIn en pas best practices toe. Mijn achtergrond in webdesign (Elementor, responsive design) geeft me een extra voorsprong in compositie en typografie. Ik werk snel en schakel makkelijk tussen taken, of het nu gaat om real-time content of een doordachte campagne.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 (met actieve lessen). Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben flexibel inzetbaar.

Ik hoop mijn motivatie en ideeën in een gesprek verder toe te lichten.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear,

When I read the Content Creator vacancy, I felt an immediate connection. You are looking for someone who spots trends, develops creative concepts, and turns them into high-quality photos, videos, and graphics – exactly what I work with daily.

At Episto (2026-present), I work as a junior digital marketer. I write SEO-focused blog content, manage social media integration, and optimize WordPress sites. Although my role is broader, my heart lies in content creation: I contribute to visual concepts, use Canva for graphics, and ensure content aligns with the brand voice. On my own project mirook.com, I am fully responsible for the content strategy: from planning posts to shooting and editing photos and short videos (Reels format). I design social media tiles, carousels, and stories, and monitor trends to stay relevant.

Your requirements – portfolio, social savvy, aesthetic eye, agility, and technical basics – I recognize in myself. My portfolio shows a mix of video, design, and copy. I understand the algorithms of Instagram, TikTok, and LinkedIn and apply best practices. My background in web design (Elementor, responsive design) gives me an extra edge in composition and typography. I work quickly and switch easily between tasks, whether it's real-time content or a well-thought-out campaign.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 (with active lessons). I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am flexible.

I hope to further explain my motivation and ideas in a conversation.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Portfolio met video, design en copy (mirook.com, Episto)
- Ervaring met contentcreatie: foto's, korte video's, graphics (Canva), social media tiles
- Social savvy: kennis van Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn algoritmes en best practices
- Oog voor esthetiek: compositie, typografie, kleurtheorie (webdesign-achtergrond)
- Wendbaar en trendgericht: snel schakelen, real-time content, trendmonitoring
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · Content Creation · SEO · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer and content creator with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO. At Episto, I create SEO-optimized blog content, manage social media integration, and build/maintain WordPress sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I produce visual content (photos, short videos), design graphics with Canva, and implement structured data for AI search visibility. Comfortable with content ideation, production, and trend monitoring; quick to adapt to new platforms and tools. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- Content creation: photo & video shooting/editing, graphic design (Canva), social media tiles, carousels, stories
- Social media: Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn – algorithms, best practices, trend monitoring, community engagement
- Copywriting: engaging captions, headlines, CTAs, brand voice
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Manage social media integration and content publishing on WordPress sites
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, Content Creation, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Produce visual content: photos, short-form videos (Reels-style), graphics (Canva), social media tiles, carousels, and stories
- Write engaging captions and copy aligned with brand voice
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
